/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_custom_interfaces/srv/detail/calculator__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
